GM:(0,0,0)  A:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  M:(1/2,1/2,0)  R:(0,1/2,1/2)  RA:(-1/2,0,1/2)  X:(0,1/2,0)  XA:(-1/2,0,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM:(0,0,0)  R:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  S:(1/2,1/2,0)  T:(0,1/2,1/2)  U:(1/2,0,1/2)  Y:(0,1/2,0)  X:(1/2,0,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM1  GM2  GM3GM4  GM5  (A)R1  (A)R2  (A)R3R4  (A)R5  (M)S1  (M)S2  (M)S3S4  (M)S5  (R)T1  (R)T2  (R)T3  (R)T4  (R)T5  (RA)U1  (RA)U2  (RA)U3  (RA)U4  (RA)U5  (X)Y1  (X)Y2  (X)Y3  (X)Y4  (X)Y5  (XA)X1  (XA)X2  (XA)X3  (XA)X4  (XA)X5  Z1  Z2  Z3Z4  Z5
1 1 2 2 1 1 2 2 1 1 2 2 1 1 1 1 2 1 1 1 1 2 1 1 1 1 2 1 1 1 1 2 1 1 2 2
